name: Low-Cal Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 3-quart tube pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, fructose, and eggs until light and lemon-colored.
4. Add remaining ingredients except carrots and pecans; beat well.
5. Stir in carrots and pecans.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30-40 minutes.
Exchanges: 1 bread + 3 fat
Recipe makes 16 servings at 229 calories each
